members.name: assumeNoThrow
members.type: nothrow @nogc (T expr, auto ref Args args)

members.name: assumeNoThrowNoGC
members.type: nothrow @nogc (T expr, auto ref Args args)

members.name: assumePure
members.type: pure (T expr, auto ref Args args)

members.name: assumeNoThrowNoGCPure
members.type: pure (T expr, auto ref Args args)

members.name: this
members.originalType: @nogc (const(char)[] msg, Throwable nextInChain = null, string file = __FILE__, size_t line = __LINE__)

members.name: create
members.originalType: @nogc NuException(const(char)[] msg, Throwable nextInChain = null, string file = __FILE__, size_t line = __LINE__)

members.name: nu_realloc
members.originalType: pure nothrow @nogc @system extern (C) void*(void* data, size_t newSize)

members.name: nu_memcpy
members.originalType: pure nothrow @nogc @system extern (C) void*(return scope void* dst, scope const void* src, size_t bytes)

members.name: nu_memmove
members.originalType: pure nothrow @nogc @system extern (C) void*(return scope void* dst, scope const void* src, size_t bytes)

members.name: nu_memset
members.originalType: pure nothrow @nogc @system extern (C) void*(return scope void* dst, ubyte value, size_t bytes)

members.name: emplace
members.type: @nogc void(ref UT dst, auto ref Args args)

members.name: emplace
members.type: @nogc void(auto ref UT dst, auto ref Args args)

members.name: __copy
members.type: @nogc @system void(ref S source, ref T target)

members.name: __move
members.type: @nogc @trusted void(ref S source, ref T target)

members.name: __moveImpl
members.type: @nogc @system void(ref S source, ref T target)

members.name: __blit
members.type: nothrow @nogc @system void(ref T to, ref T from)

members.name: __copy_postblit
members.type: @nogc @system void(ref S source, ref T target)

members.name: __move_postblit
members.type: @nogc @system void(ref T newLocation, ref T oldLocation)

members.name: nu_is_aligned
members.type: pure nothrow @nogc @trusted bool(T value, size_t alignment)

members.name: nu_min
members.type: pure nothrow @nogc ref @trusted T(auto ref T a, auto ref T b)

members.name: nu_max
members.type: pure nothrow @nogc ref @trusted T(auto ref T a, auto ref T b)

members.name: nu_resize
members.type: @nogc ref T[](ref T[] buffer, size_t length, int alignment = 1)

members.name: nu_terminate
members.constraint: is(T == char) || is(T == wchar) || is(T == dchar)

members.name: nu_swap
members.type: @nogc void(ref T a, ref T b)

members.name: nu_is_overlapping
members.originalType: nothrow @nogc extern (C) bool(void* a, size_t aLength, void* b, size_t bLength)

members.name: nu_aligned_size
members.originalType: pure nothrow @nogc @safe extern (C) size_t(size_t request, size_t alignment)

members.name: nu_realign
members.originalType: pure nothrow @nogc @trusted extern (C) void*(void* ptr, size_t alignment)

members.name: nu_aligned_alloc
members.originalType: pure nothrow @nogc extern (C) void*(size_t size, size_t alignment)

members.name: nu_aligned_realloc
members.originalType: pure nothrow @nogc extern (C) void*(void* ptr, size_t size, size_t alignment)

members.name: nu_aligned_realloc_destructive
members.originalType: pure nothrow @nogc extern (C) void*(void* ptr, size_t size, size_t alignment)

members.name: nu_aligned_free
members.originalType: pure nothrow @nogc extern (C) void(void* ptr, size_t alignment)

members.name: __nu_store_aligned_ptr
members.originalType: pure nothrow @nogc void*(void* ptr, size_t size, size_t alignment)

members.name: __nu_aligned_realloc
members.type: pure nothrow @nogc void*(void* aligned, size_t size, size_t alignment)

members.name: isMovable
members.init: is(T == struct) || is(T == union) || __traits(isStaticArray, T) && hasElaborateMove!(T.init[0])

members.name: isAggregateType
members.init: is(T == class) || is(T == interface) || is(T == struct) || is(T == union)

members.name: isSomeFunction
members.init: is(T == return) || is(typeof(T) == return) || is(typeof(&T) == return)

members.name: nogc_new
members.type: @trusted Ref!T(NuHeap heap, auto ref Args args)

members.name: nogc_trynew
members.type: nothrow @trusted Ref!T(NuHeap heap, auto ref Args args)

members.name: nogc_trydelete
members.type: nothrow @trusted bool(NuHeap heap, ref T obj_)

members.name: nogc_emplace
members.type: @trusted void(auto ref T dest, Args args)

members.name: moveTo
members.type: @trusted void(ref T from, ref T to)

members.name: copyTo
members.type: @trusted void(ref T from, ref T to)

members.name: some
members.type: nothrow @nogc ref @trusted Option!T(auto ref T value)

members.name: ok
members.type: nothrow @nogc ref @trusted Result!T(auto ref T value)

members.name: less
members.type: bool(auto ref T a, auto ref T b)

members.name: greater
members.type: bool(auto ref T a, auto ref T b)

members.name: greaterEqual
members.type: bool(auto ref T a, auto ref T b)

members.name: lessEqual
members.type: bool(auto ref T a, auto ref T b)

members.name: mergeAt
members.type: void(R range, Slice[] stack, immutable size_t at, ref size_t minGallop, ref T[] temp)

members.name: merge
members.type: void(R range, size_t mid, ref size_t minGallop, ref T[] temp)

members.name: mergeLo
members.type: size_t(R range, immutable size_t mid, size_t minGallop, T[] temp)

members.name: mergeHi
members.type: size_t(R range, immutable size_t mid, size_t minGallop, T[] temp)

members.type: void(ref X from, const size_t fIdx, ref Y to, const size_t tIdx)
